front.title: Module-Lattice Digital Signature Algorithm for DNSSEC

abstract.t: This document describes how to specify Module-Lattice-Based Digital Signature Algorithm (ML-DSA) keys and signatures in DNS Security (DNSSEC). It uses the ML-DSA-44 parameter set defined in FIPS 204. ML-DSA-44 is believed to be secure even against adversaries in possession of a cryptographically relevant quantum computer.
